title: End-to-end supersede dry-run on a real decision + GH #32/#33/#34 closure evidence
action: Per plan slice 4: exercise the full propagation pipeline on a REAL decision in THIS repo, then assemble issue-closure evidence. (1) Target: decision d20f4c96 («hardening-1-7-10 complete … release NOT tagged (user decision)») — factually superseded: v1.7.10-rc was tagged on 4f23f89 with exact-commit CI green on Linux+Windows (rc-1..5). Run `decisions supersede --target d20f4c96… --decision "hardening-1-7-10 complete AND released as v1.7.10-rc on 4f23f89 (rc-1..5: CPU-count-proof race suites, timeout-capture split, Windows transient-fs retry); exact-tag CI green both platforms" --rationale …` with appropriate --tags (release,ci) — scope inherits. (2) Observe the sweep output; for every hit, reconcile the citing artifact same-turn (edit the doc so it reads the current truth, citing the NEW short8) or explicitly record a waiver; confirm one capture stub per hit appeared and flush the reconciled ones. (3) Re-render the index (`decisions render`), `--check` clean; confirm the superseded decision left the index and the new one appears under its group. (4) Write the e2e evidence report to docs/history/decision-propagation/reports/e2e-supersede.md: sweep hit list, reconciliation diff summary, stub lifecycle, index before/after lines, search --tag release showing the new event. (5) Draft GH closure comments for #32/#33/#34 into the same reports dir (one md file per issue, referencing commits dp-1..dp-8 and the concrete mechanisms) — do NOT post them; the orchestrator posts at feature close. run_verify green at the end.

truths: a real supersede ran with sweep output recorded; every hit reconciled or explicitly waived; stubs observed and flushed for reconciled hits
index re-rendered clean; superseded event absent, successor present
e2e report + three issue-closure drafts exist under docs/history/decision-propagation/reports/
prohibitions: Do not fabricate a reversal — the target decision's 'release NOT tagged' clause is genuinely outdated

trace.outcome: E2E proven live: real supersede of d20f4c96 -> 257ab1e5 with sweep (2 hits: 1 reconciled via render, 1 waived with recorded reason), stub lifecycle exercised, index self-corrected, issue-closure drafts written
trace.verify_output: decisions render --check: docs/decisions/index.md is up to date. run_verify: PASS 55 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=59863ms. Real supersede: d20f4c96 -> 257ab1e5-e6ec-46fd-9ba1-ac52bc08601c. Sweep hits=2 (docs/decisions/index.md:150,699); line 699 reconciled by index re-render (stub d4faffe3 flushed); line 150 waived (citation inside immutable e230444a decide-event text, stub 09bf2874 left pending with reason). Index before/after grep confirmed old entry gone, successor present under workflow-state. decisions search --tag release shows 257ab1e5. Reports: docs/history/decision-propagation/reports/e2e-supersede.md, issue-32-closure.md, issue-33-closure.md, issue-34-closure.md
